title: GitHub - MasihMoafi/Elpis: You put an agent into an Elpis, and it becomes Elpis; Be Elpis my friend.
excerpt: You put an agent into an Elpis, and it becomes Elpis; Be Elpis my friend. - MasihMoafi/Elpis
content_html:
name Elpis
type terminal coding-agent shell for long-running developer workflows

A coding agent should not need the full transcript to remember why it is changing your code.

Elpis is a terminal coding-agent shell that keeps goals, selected context, memory, and evidence separate from the raw conversation log. It is for developers running long or repeated coding sessions who want to inspect what enters the next model request instead of treating the transcript as the product state.

Current release: v0.1.0 on Linux x86_64. Release acceptance and the live development state are tracked in TASKS.md.

Quick start

Install the latest Linux x86_64 release and start Elpis:

mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && curl -fsSL https://github.com/MasihMoafi/Elpis/releases/latest/download/elpis-linux-x86_64 | install -m 755 /dev/stdin "$HOME/.local/bin/elpis"
elpis

Expected result:

$ elpis
Welcome to Elpis
›

This assumes ~/.local/bin is on your PATH. On first launch, choose a provider and complete its sign-in or API-key setup.

Deeper guides are hosted on GitHub Pages:

  • Context and sessions
  • Memory
  • Provider configuration

Proof: one controlled context-pruning comparison

The screenshots below show Elpis and Codex running the same task. In this recorded comparison, Elpis ended with 93% free context and Codex with 73% free context.

This is a reproducible demonstration of one workflow, not a claim that Elpis will produce the same reduction on every task.

Initial prompt submission

Execution outcome

Elpis: 93% free context remaining

Codex: 73% free context remaining

The problem

Long coding-agent sessions accumulate transcripts and tool output. Important goals and decisions can become difficult to distinguish from disposable execution detail, while replaying large histories consumes context that could be used for the current task.

Elpis addresses that specific workflow problem by keeping exact evidence on disk while admitting a smaller, inspectable working set into the next request.

How it works

Elpis uses three context-reduction layers:

Level Component Trigger Operation Inspection
1 Deterministic tool cleaner Tool output over 1,200 characters Replaces oversized stdout/stderr with positional head/tail receipts /status and rollout://tool-call/<id> evidence pointers
2 Ace model pruner End of eligible turns Evaluates conversation turns and removes transient material while retaining selected decisions /prune and the local pruning report
3 Session compaction /compact or context-budget pressure Compacts older history while preserving portable goal/checkpoint state Context Ledger, /usage, and local rollout logs

The execution foundation—terminal UI, patches, permissions, sandboxing, and sessions—is derived from OpenAI's Apache-2.0 Codex CLI. Elpis adds its own context, continuity, memory, retrieval, and provider-control layer around that execution loop.

Working model

Elpis keeps the surrounding control environment stable while the selected runtime performs the model loop. Exact artifacts stay available as evidence; the next request receives only the admitted working set.

Context and session continuity

Rules, the current request, portable state, added files, and selected memory are represented separately. The Context Ledger and /usage expose why a source is present and how much space it occupies.

Full conversations, terminal events, and artifacts remain on disk. Elpis can retrieve exact evidence later instead of attaching the full history to every request.

Memory

Reusable facts are promoted into bounded durable memory only after repeated useful recall. Deleted or faded memory is archived before reset.

Read-only RAG

The optional local RAG sidecar exposes one read-only retrieval tool. Embeddings and indexing load only when semantic retrieval is requested.

Execution and evidence

Consequential actions pass through visible permission and sandbox controls. Outcomes and supporting evidence remain inspectable after execution.

Current state

Source of truth: TASKS.md.

Implemented and verified

  • v0.1.0 Linux x86_64 release path and checksummed installer.
  • Ratatui terminal interface with streaming commands, patches, permission modes, sandboxing, sessions, and compaction.
  • Dual-layer pruning: deterministic tool receipts plus Ace message pruning.
  • Context Ledger and /usage source accounting.
  • Portable GOAL.md + ES.md continuity and exact session resume.
  • Bounded local memory with provenance, recall tracking, promotion, and archival.
  • Local read-only RAG.
  • OpenAI subscription authentication plus supported Anthropic, Gemini, and OpenRouter adapters.
  • Context Ledger interaction accepted by the project owner on 2026-07-23.

Implemented, still under ongoing acceptance/polish

  • The current baseline remains under bug-fix and UI-polish work. Existing context, continuity, pruning, memory, RAG, provider, permission, and session behavior are treated as foundational regressions if they break.

Planned or deferred

  • Easier installation and distribution.
  • Apple Silicon macOS build targeted for v0.2; Windows comes later.
  • Structured interactive clarification.
  • Multi-agent controls and /multi-task.
  • Voice input.
  • LSP-backed code intelligence.
  • /auto cost-saving model routing remains a deferred experiment until it proves that routing actually reduces total cost without unacceptable mistakes.

Not supported in v0.1.0

  • macOS and Windows release binaries.
  • /auto, /multi-task, voice input, and LSP integration.

What sets the design apart

These are design choices, not novelty claims:

  • Context is inspectable. The Context Ledger shows admitted sources instead of treating the full transcript as an opaque prompt.
  • Evidence and working context are different things. Exact artifacts stay durable even when they are not resent to the model.
  • Continuity is explicit. Goal and checkpoint state can survive compaction or a fresh session without replaying the entire conversation.
  • Memory is selective. Reusable memory is bounded and promoted from evidence rather than equated with stored chat history.
  • Provider identity stays visible. The control layer does not silently collapse provider selection into one opaque route.

Evals and test series

Linux verification and binary builds run through .github/workflows/embedded-elpis-linux.yml.

Ordinary changes run focused first-release checks and build the Elpis binary. Broader inherited TUI/app-server regression runs are reserved for nightly, manual, and tagged-release workflows.

The Python retrieval service has focused tests under tests/. Release acceptance is tracked in TASKS.md. Build and dependency-reduction measurements live in docs/BUILD_AND_REDUCTION_AUDIT.md.

A passing CI badge proves that the configured automated checks passed for the referenced commit. It does not prove that every provider, workflow, or long-running session shape has been exercised.

Install from a checkout

Tagged releases publish a checksummed binary. From a checkout:

scripts/install-elpis.sh

The installer verifies the checksum and installs elpis into ~/.local/bin atomically.

To enable the optional local RAG sidecar:

scripts/setup-rag.sh

The setup script creates the environment and writes the mcp_servers.elpis-rag entry in config.toml using paths derived from the current checkout.

Provider examples:

# OpenRouter
export OPENROUTER_API_KEY="your-key"
elpis --provider openrouter --model "provider/model"

# Native Anthropic adapter
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your-key"
elpis --provider anthropic

# Native Gemini adapter
export GEMINI_API_KEY="your-key"
elpis --provider google-gemini

External docs

Keep the README high-level; use the documentation site for deeper contracts and configuration:

  • Context and sessions
  • Memory
  • Providers
  • GUIDE.md — product vision, requirements, and architecture source of truth
  • TASKS.md — current release state and backlog
  • docs/BUILD_AND_REDUCTION_AUDIT.md — measured build/subtraction work

Future development

Only work already represented in TASKS.md belongs here. The near-term direction is baseline polish and distribution before new feature expansion.

Repository map

  • codex-rs/ — Rust application and TUI.
  • src/ — local retrieval service.
  • AGENTS.md — agent workflow and definition of done.
  • GUIDE.md — product vision, requirements, and architecture source of truth.
  • TASKS.md — live task and acceptance source of truth.
  • docs/CONTEXT_AND_SESSIONS.md — context and continuation contract.
  • docs/BUILD_AND_REDUCTION_AUDIT.md — build baseline and measured subtraction plan.

License

Elpis is MIT licensed. Codex-derived source retains its upstream Apache-2.0 notices and attribution.

sentences.zh: 事实来源：TASKS.md。

sentences.en: Implemented and verified
sentences.zh: 已实施并验证

blocks.html_en: • v0.1.0 Linux x86_64 release path and checksummed installer.

sentences.en: v0.1.0 Linux x86_64 release path and checksummed installer.
sentences.zh: v0.1.0 Linux x86_64 发行路径和校验和安装程序。

blocks.html_en: • Ratatui terminal interface with streaming commands, patches, permission modes, sandboxing, sessions, and compaction.

sentences.en: Ratatui terminal interface with streaming commands, patches, permission modes, sandboxing, sessions, and compaction.
sentences.zh: Ratatui 终端界面具有流命令、补丁、权限模式、沙箱、会话和压缩。

blocks.html_en: • Dual-layer pruning: deterministic tool receipts plus Ace message pruning.

sentences.en: Dual-layer pruning: deterministic tool receipts plus Ace message pruning.
sentences.zh: 双层剪枝：确定性工具收据加上Ace消息剪枝。

sentences.en: Context Ledger and /usage source accounting.
sentences.zh: 上下文分类帐和/使用源会计。

sentences.en: Portable GOAL.md + ES.md continuity and exact session resume.
sentences.zh: 可移植的 GOAL.md + ES.md 连续性和准确的会话恢复。

blocks.html_en: • Bounded local memory with provenance, recall tracking, promotion, and archival.

sentences.en: Bounded local memory with provenance, recall tracking, promotion, and archival.
sentences.zh: 具有出处、回忆跟踪、升级和存档的有限本地内存。

sentences.en: Local read-only RAG.
sentences.zh: 本地只读 RAG。

blocks.html_en: • OpenAI subscription authentication plus supported Anthropic, Gemini, and OpenRouter adapters.

sentences.en: OpenAI subscription authentication plus supported Anthropic, Gemini, and OpenRouter adapters.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 订阅身份验证以及支持的 Anthropic、Gemini 和 OpenRouter 适配器。

blocks.html_en: • Context Ledger interaction accepted by the project owner on 2026-07-23.

sentences.en: Context Ledger interaction accepted by the project owner on 2026-07-23.
sentences.zh: Context Ledger 交互已于 2026 年 7 月 23 日被项目所有者接受。

blocks.html_en: Implemented, still under ongoing acceptance/polish

sentences.en: Implemented, still under ongoing acceptance/polish
sentences.zh: 已实施，仍在持续验收/完善中

blocks.html_en: • The current baseline remains under bug-fix and UI-polish work. Existing context, continuity, pruning, memory, RAG, provider, permission, and session behavior are treated as foundational regressions if they break.

sentences.en: The current baseline remains under bug-fix and UI-polish work.
sentences.zh: 当前的基线仍处于错误修复和 UI 抛光工作中。

sentences.en: Existing context, continuity, pruning, memory, RAG, provider, permission, and session behavior are treated as foundational regressions if they break.
sentences.zh: 现有的上下文、连续性、修剪、内存、RAG、提供者、权限和会话行为如果被破坏，将被视为基础回归。

sentences.en: Planned or deferred
sentences.zh: 计划或推迟

sentences.en: Easier installation and distribution.
sentences.zh: 更容易安装和分发。

blocks.html_en: • Apple Silicon macOS build targeted for v0.2; Windows comes later.

sentences.en: Apple Silicon macOS build targeted for v0.2; Windows comes later.
sentences.zh: Apple Silicon macOS 版本针对 v0.2； Windows 出现得比较晚。

sentences.en: Structured interactive clarification.
sentences.zh: 结构化交互式澄清。

sentences.en: Multi-agent controls and /multi-task.
sentences.zh: 多代理控制和/多任务。

sentences.en: Voice input.
sentences.zh: 语音输入。

sentences.en: LSP-backed code intelligence.
sentences.zh: LSP 支持的代码智能。

blocks.html_en: • /auto cost-saving model routing remains a deferred experiment until it proves that routing actually reduces total cost without unacceptable mistakes.

sentences.en: /auto cost-saving model routing remains a deferred experiment until it proves that routing actually reduces total cost without unacceptable mistakes.
sentences.zh: /auto 成本节省模型路由仍然是一个推迟的实验，直到它证明路由实际上降低了总成本并且没有不可接受的错误。

sentences.en: Not supported in v0.1.0
sentences.zh: v0.1.0 不支持

sentences.en: macOS and Windows release binaries.
sentences.zh: macOS 和 Windows 发布二进制文件。

sentences.en: /auto, /multi-task, voice input, and LSP integration.
sentences.zh: /auto、/multitask、语音输入和 LSP 集成。

blocks.html_en: What sets the design apart

sentences.en: What sets the design apart
sentences.zh: 是什么让设计与众不同

blocks.html_en: These are design choices, not novelty claims:

sentences.en: These are design choices, not novelty claims:
sentences.zh: 这些是设计选择，而不是新颖的主张：

blocks.html_en: • Context is inspectable. The Context Ledger shows admitted sources instead of treating the full transcript as an opaque prompt.

sentences.en: Context is inspectable.
sentences.zh: 上下文是可以检查的。

sentences.en: The Context Ledger shows admitted sources instead of treating the full transcript as an opaque prompt.
sentences.zh: 上下文分类帐显示承认的来源，而不是将完整的记录视为不透明的提示。

blocks.html_en: • Evidence and working context are different things. Exact artifacts stay durable even when they are not resent to the model.

sentences.en: Evidence and working context are different things.
sentences.zh: 证据和工作环境是不同的事情。

sentences.en: Exact artifacts stay durable even when they are not resent to the model.
sentences.zh: 即使精确的工件不重新发送给模型，它们也能保持持久性。

blocks.html_en: • Continuity is explicit. Goal and checkpoint state can survive compaction or a fresh session without replaying the entire conversation.

sentences.en: Continuity is explicit.
sentences.zh: 连续性是明确的。

sentences.en: Goal and checkpoint state can survive compaction or a fresh session without replaying the entire conversation.
sentences.zh: 目标和检查点状态可以在压缩或新会话中幸存下来，而无需重播整个对话。

blocks.html_en: • Memory is selective. Reusable memory is bounded and promoted from evidence rather than equated with stored chat history.

sentences.en: Memory is selective.
sentences.zh: 记忆是有选择性的。

sentences.en: Reusable memory is bounded and promoted from evidence rather than equated with stored chat history.
sentences.zh: 可重用的内存是有界的，并根据证据进行提升，而不是等同于存储的聊天历史记录。

blocks.html_en: • Provider identity stays visible. The control layer does not silently collapse provider selection into one opaque route.

sentences.en: Provider identity stays visible.
sentences.zh: 提供者身份保持可见。

sentences.en: The control layer does not silently collapse provider selection into one opaque route.
sentences.zh: 控制层不会默默地将提供商选择折叠成一条不透明的路线。

sentences.en: Evals and test series
sentences.zh: 评估和测试系列

sentences.en: Linux verification and binary builds run through .github/workflows/embedded-elpis-linux.yml.
sentences.zh: Linux 验证和二进制构建通过 .github/workflows/embedded-elpis-linux.yml 运行。

blocks.html_en: Ordinary changes run focused first-release checks and build the Elpis binary. Broader inherited TUI/app-server regression runs are reserved for nightly, manual, and tagged-release workflows.

sentences.en: Ordinary changes run focused first-release checks and build the Elpis binary.

sentences.en: Broader inherited TUI/app-server regression runs are reserved for nightly, manual, and tagged-release workflows.
sentences.zh: 更广泛的继承 TUI/应用程序服务器回归运行保留用于夜间、手动和标记发布工作流程。

blocks.html_en: The Python retrieval service has focused tests under tests/. Release acceptance is tracked in TASKS.md. Build and dependency-reduction measurements live in docs/BUILD_AND_REDUCTION_AUDIT.md.

sentences.en: The Python retrieval service has focused tests under tests/.
sentences.zh: Python检索服务将测试集中在tests/下。

sentences.en: Release acceptance is tracked in TASKS.md.
sentences.zh: 发布接受情况在 TASKS.md 中进行跟踪。

sentences.en: Build and dependency-reduction measurements live in docs/BUILD_AND_REDUCTION_AUDIT.md.
sentences.zh: 构建和依赖减少测量位于 docs/BUILD_AND_REDUCTION_AUDIT.md 中。

blocks.html_en: A passing CI badge proves that the configured automated checks passed for the referenced commit. It does not prove that every provider, workflow, or long-running session shape has been exercised.

sentences.en: A passing CI badge proves that the configured automated checks passed for the referenced commit.
sentences.zh: 通过 CI 徽章证明引用提交的配置自动检查已通过。

sentences.en: It does not prove that every provider, workflow, or long-running session shape has been exercised.
sentences.zh: 它并不能证明每个提供程序、工作流程或长时间运行的会话形状都已被执行。

blocks.html_en: Elpis is MIT licensed. Codex-derived source retains its upstream Apache-2.0 notices and attribution.

sentences.en: Codex-derived source retains its upstream Apache-2.0 notices and attribution.
sentences.zh: Codex 衍生源保留其上游 Apache-2.0 通知和归属。

content_html_zh:
name Elpis
type 用于长期运行的开发人员工作流程的终端编码代理 shell

编码代理不需要完整的记录来记住它更改代码的原因。

Elpis 是一个终端编码代理 shell，它将目标、选定的上下文、记忆和证据与原始对话日志分开。 它适用于运行长时间或重复编码会话的开发人员，他们想要检查进入下一个模型请求的内容，而不是将转录视为产品状态。

当前版本：Linux x86_64 上的 v0.1.0。 TASKS.md 中跟踪发布接受情况和实时开发状态。

快速启动

安装最新的 Linux x86_64 版本并启动 Elpis：

mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && curl -fsSL https://github.com/MasihMoafi/Elpis/releases/latest/download/elpis-linux-x86_64 | install -m 755 /dev/stdin "$HOME/.local/bin/elpis"
elpis

预期结果：

$ elpis
Welcome to Elpis
›

这假设 ~/.local/bin 在您的 PATH 上。 首次启动时，选择提供商并完成其登录或 API 密钥设置。

更深入的指南托管在 GitHub Pages 上：

  • 背景和会话
  • 记忆
  • 提供商配置

证明：一种受控上下文修剪比较

下面的屏幕截图显示 Elpis 和 Codex 运行相同的任务。 在此记录的比较中，Elpis 的自由上下文为 93%，Codex 的自由上下文为 73%。

这是一个工作流程的可重复演示，而不是声称 Elpis 会对每项任务产生相同的减少。

初始提示提交

执行结果

Elpis：剩余 93% 的可用上下文

Codex：剩余 73% 的可用上下文

问题

长时间的编码代理会话会积累转录本和工具输出。 重要的目标和决策可能变得难以与一次性执行细节区分开来，而重播大量历史记录会消耗可用于当前任务的上下文。

Elpis 通过在磁盘上保留准确的证据，同时允许较小的、可检查的工作集进入下一个请求来解决特定的工作流程问题。

它是如何运作的

Elpis 使用三个上下文缩减层：

Level 成分 扳机 手术 检查
1 确定性工具清理器 工具输出超过 1,200 个字符 用位置头/尾收据替换超大的 stdout/stderr /status 和 rollout://tool-call/<id> 证据指针
2 王牌模型剪枝机 合格回合结束 评估谈话转向并删除瞬态材料，同时保留选定的决策 /prune 和本地修剪报告
3 会话压缩 /紧凑或环境预算压力 压缩较旧的历史记录，同时保留可移植的目标/检查点状态 Context Ledger、/usage 和本地部署日志

执行基础——终端 UI、补丁、权限、沙箱和会话——源自 OpenAI 的 Apache-2.0 Codex CLI。 Elpis 在该执行循环周围添加了自己的上下文、连续性、内存、检索和提供者控制层。

工作模式

当选定的运行时执行模型循环时，Elpis 保持周围控制环境的稳定。 精确的文物仍可作为证据；下一个请求仅接收已承认的工作集。

上下文和会话连续性

规则、当前请求、可移植状态、添加的文件和选定的内存分别表示。 Context Ledger 和 /usage 揭示了源存在的原因以及它占用了多少空间。

完整的对话、终端事件和工件保留在磁盘上。 Elpis 可以稍后检索准确的证据，而不是在每个请求中附加完整的历史记录。

记忆

只有在重复有用的回忆之后，可重复使用的事实才会被提升为有限的持久记忆。 删除或褪色的内存在重置之前会被存档。

只读 RAG

可选的本地 RAG sidecar 公开了一种只读检索工具。 仅当请求语义检索时才加载嵌入和索引。

执行及证据

后续操作会通过可见的权限和沙箱控制。 结果和支持证据在执行后仍然可以检查。

目前状态

事实来源：TASKS.md。

已实施并验证

  • v0.1.0 Linux x86_64 发行路径和校验和安装程序。
  • Ratatui 终端界面具有流命令、补丁、权限模式、沙箱、会话和压缩。
  • 双层剪枝：确定性工具收据加上Ace消息剪枝。
  • 上下文分类帐和/使用源会计。
  • 可移植的 GOAL.md + ES.md 连续性和准确的会话恢复。
  • 具有出处、回忆跟踪、升级和存档的有限本地内存。
  • 本地只读 RAG。
  • OpenAI 订阅身份验证以及支持的 Anthropic、Gemini 和 OpenRouter 适配器。
  • Context Ledger 交互已于 2026 年 7 月 23 日被项目所有者接受。

已实施，仍在持续验收/完善中

  • 当前的基线仍处于错误修复和 UI 抛光工作中。 现有的上下文、连续性、修剪、内存、RAG、提供者、权限和会话行为如果被破坏，将被视为基础回归。

计划或推迟

  • 更容易安装和分发。
  • Apple Silicon macOS 版本针对 v0.2； Windows 出现得比较晚。
  • 结构化交互式澄清。
  • 多代理控制和/多任务。
  • 语音输入。
  • LSP 支持的代码智能。
  • /auto 成本节省模型路由仍然是一个推迟的实验，直到它证明路由实际上降低了总成本并且没有不可接受的错误。

v0.1.0 不支持

  • macOS 和 Windows 发布二进制文件。
  • /auto、/multitask、语音输入和 LSP 集成。

是什么让设计与众不同

这些是设计选择，而不是新颖的主张：

  • 上下文是可以检查的。 上下文分类帐显示承认的来源，而不是将完整的记录视为不透明的提示。
  • 证据和工作环境是不同的事情。 即使精确的工件不重新发送给模型，它们也能保持持久性。
  • 连续性是明确的。 目标和检查点状态可以在压缩或新会话中幸存下来，而无需重播整个对话。
  • 记忆是有选择性的。 可重用的内存是有界的，并根据证据进行提升，而不是等同于存储的聊天历史记录。
  • 提供者身份保持可见。 控制层不会默默地将提供商选择折叠成一条不透明的路线。

评估和测试系列

Linux 验证和二进制构建通过 .github/workflows/embedded-elpis-linux.yml 运行。

普通更改会运行集中的首次发布检查并构建 Elpis 二进制文件。 更广泛的继承 TUI/应用程序服务器回归运行保留用于夜间、手动和标记发布工作流程。

Python检索服务将测试集中在tests/下。 发布接受情况在 TASKS.md 中进行跟踪。 构建和依赖减少测量位于 docs/BUILD_AND_REDUCTION_AUDIT.md 中。

通过 CI 徽章证明引用提交的配置自动检查已通过。 它并不能证明每个提供程序、工作流程或长时间运行的会话形状都已被执行。

从结账处安装

标记的版本发布一个校验和二进制文件。 从结账处：

scripts/install-elpis.sh

安装程序会验证校验和并将 elpis 自动安装到 ~/.local/bin 中。

要启用可选的本地 RAG sidecar：

scripts/setup-rag.sh

安装脚本创建环境并使用从当前签出派生的路径将 mcp_servers.elpis-rag 条目写入 config.toml 中。

提供者示例：

# OpenRouter
export OPENROUTER_API_KEY="your-key"
elpis --provider openrouter --model "provider/model"

# Native Anthropic adapter
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your-key"
elpis --provider anthropic

# Native Gemini adapter
export GEMINI_API_KEY="your-key"
elpis --provider google-gemini

外部文档

保持自述文件的高水平；使用文档站点进行更深入的合同和配置：

  • 背景和会话
  • 记忆
  • 供应商
  • GUIDE.md — 产品愿景、需求和架构的真实来源
  • TASKS.md — 当前版本状态和积压工作
  • docs/BUILD_AND_REDUCTION_AUDIT.md — 测量的构建/减法工作

未来发展

只有 TASKS.md 中已经出现的工作才属于此处。 近期方向是新功能扩展之前的基线完善和分发。

存储库地图

  • codex-rs/ — Rust 应用程序和 TUI。
  • src/ — 本地检索服务。
  • AGENTS.md — 代理工作流程和完成的定义。
  • GUIDE.md — 产品愿景、需求和架构的真实来源。
  • TASKS.md — 实时任务和接受事实来源。
  • docs/CONTEXT_AND_SESSIONS.md — 上下文和延续合约。
  • docs/BUILD_AND_REDUCTION_AUDIT.md — 构建基线和测量的减法计划。

执照

Elpis 已获得麻省理工学院许可。 Codex 衍生源保留其上游 Apache-2.0 通知和归属。
